parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "model": "qwen3-vl-4b",
  "prompt": "You are an SEO expert analyzing blog posts for Hudson Digital Solutions, a web development consultancy.

Analyze this blog post for SEO optimization:

Post Title: {{ $json.post_title }}
URL Slug: {{ $json.post_slug }}
Word Count: {{ $json.word_count }}
Tags: {{ $json.tags }}

Current Meta Description ({{ $json.meta_description_length }} chars): {{ $json.meta_description }}

Post Excerpt: {{ $json.post_excerpt }}

Content Preview (first 2000 chars):
{{ $json.text_content }}

---

SEO Analysis Checklist:
1. Title optimization (60 chars max, includes target keyword)
2. Meta description (150-160 chars, compelling, includes CTA)
3. URL slug (short, keyword-rich, readable)
4. Content length (1500+ words ideal for technical content)
5. Keyword usage and density
6. Readability and structure
7. Internal/external link opportunities
8. Image alt text presence

Provide:
- SEO score (0-100)
- Optimized meta description (if current is poor/missing)
- Suggested title improvements (if needed)
- Top 3 actionable recommendations

Respond ONLY in valid JSON format:
{
  "seo_score": <number 0-100>,
  "title_optimized": <boolean>,
  "meta_description_optimized": <boolean>,
  "suggested_meta_description": "<150-160 char meta description>",
  "suggested_title": "<improved title if needed, else empty string>",
  "primary_keyword": "<detected primary keyword>",
  "recommendations": [
    "<recommendation 1>",
    "<recommendation 2>",
    "<recommendation 3>"
  ],
  "content_quality": "<excellent | good | needs_improvement>",
  "readability_score": <number 0-100>
}",
  "stream": false
}
